backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing a quiz system with question management, user attempt tracking, score calculation, and leaderboard functionality using persistent state with Lists and Maps.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining type transformations from old actor state (with userAnswersList) to new actor state (with userAttempts Map), preserving questionsList during upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: Internet Identity authentication integration, user profile/history page for tracking quiz results, and authenticated quiz submission flow.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of 13 frontend files covering routing, pages (home, quiz, results, profile), components (auth, layout, cards), hooks, and styling with warm wellness theme.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining design tokens for backgrounds, borders, and UI elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, page title 'Mental Wellness Quiz', root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, quiz, results, and profile pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout with Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AttemptCard.tsx: Card component displaying a single quiz attempt with formatted timestamp, score percentage, performance badge (Excellent/Good Progress/Growing), and supportive feedback message.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Authentication button component using useInternetIdentity hook to toggle login/logout states with loading indicators and appropriate icons.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackCard.tsx: Animated card component displaying supportive feedback messages with check icon and staggered fade-in animation controlled by delay prop.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application layout wrapper with sticky header containing branding, conditional profile navigation for authenticated users, auth button, and footer with attribution and disclaimer.
frontend/src/components/QuizQuestion.tsx: Reusable quiz question component rendering question text and radio button options with hover effects and visual feedback for selected answers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching questions, submitting quiz answers, and retrieving user attempts and leaderboard data from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm, calming color palette (peach, pink, lavender) for mental wellness theming in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page component displaying a welcoming mental wellness quiz introduction with feature cards (safe space, personalized, supportive) and a call-to-action button to start the quiz.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page showing quiz attempt history and statistics for authenticated users, or a login prompt for anonymous users, with visual progress tracking and attempt cards.
frontend/src/pages/QuizPage.tsx: Interactive quiz interface with question navigation, answer selection, progress tracking, and submission logic that stores results locally or submits to backend based on authentication status.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Displays quiz results with score calculation, personalized feedback based on performance percentage, and authentication prompts. Allows users to save results to their profile when logged in via Internet Identity.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette (including mental health theme colors like warm-peach, soft-pink, gentle-lavender), border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (quiz interface, results display, Internet Identity auth, user profiles) and pending feature requests (backend storage, quiz history retrieval) for a mental health quiz app targeting young women.
